title: wibta if i reported someone for academic dishonesty?
text: there's this girl i follow on instagram who posted a story stating that she wanted someone to message her so they can take an exam for her. ​ wibta if i reported her to the school she attends?  i don't know her that well, but she's definitely not the best person out there.  i just think it's really unfair to those who study and take the exam for real.

storyboard.content: There is a girl I follow on Instagram. I don't know her that well, but she's definitely not the best person out there.
She posted a story on Instagram stating that she wanted someone to message her so they could take an exam for her.
I am considering reporting her to the school she attends for academic dishonesty.
I think it's really unfair to those who study and take the exam for real.
This isn't personal — it's about the principle of fairness.
